channel.title: Experiences on Felix Ogon
channel.description: Recent content in Experiences on Felix Ogon

item.title: Software Engineer @ S2S Ventures
item.description:
• Leveraging data to make informed investment decisions for an 11M € student-led VC fund[cite: 20, 23, 24].
  • Building a sourcing agent to filter companies of interest via targeted data scraping[cite: 24].

item.title: Freelance Robotics Engineer @ ORCA Dexterity
item.description:
• Assembled and calibrated a 17-DoF tendon-driven robotic hand with integrated tactile sensors[cite: 26, 27, 29].
  • Trained via 7+ hour uninterrupted imitation learning, achieving human-like dexterity[cite: 30].

item.title: Alsco Developer @ aCentauri Solar Racing
item.description:
• Engineered a scalable pipeline for surrogate modelling of aerodynamic drag[cite: 31, 32, 34].
  • Trained a RegPointNet model to predict drag coefficients, replacing CFD with near-instant inference[cite: 35].
